name: OPHELIA LaCROIX
title: RED CAGE RAIDER

abilities.name: Quick Draw
abilities.text: After this model suffers damage from an enemy attack that targeted it, it may drain a (soulstone) to deal 2 damage to the attacker and gain an Impact token.

abilities.name: Threatening Demeanor
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

actions.name: The Boss' Boomstick
actions.costs_and_restrictions: When this action is declared, choose if it has a range of "(melee)1" or "(gun)12".
actions.effects: If this action kills the target, this model may attach an Improvised Enhancement upgrade.

triggers.name: Ready!
triggers.text: An ally within 6" may move up to 3".

triggers.name: Aim!
triggers.text: This model may gain an Impact token or Adaptable token.

triggers.name: Fire!
triggers.text: Enemy models within (aura)2" of the target gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Sparklin' Opportunity
actions.effects: The target moves up to 4" toward a Strategy marker in its LoS.

triggers.name: Hey Young 'Un:
triggers.text: When resolving, summon a Young LaCroix in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: "Don't Screw This Up!":
triggers.text: The target declares the Interact action.

actions.name: Imitate
actions.effects: This model declares one of the target's actions.

triggers.name: An' Improvise:
triggers.text: This model may attach an Improvised Enhancement upgrade.

triggers.name: Befuddled:
triggers.text: Target may discard a card. If it does not, it is dealt 2 damage.

merge_warnings: Title mismatch: front='RED CAGE RAIDER' back='Red Cage Raider'
extraction_notes: Health bar shows numbered pips from 1 to 14, confirming health value of 14
Bottom-right shows 'Young LaCroix' which appears to be the totem for this Master
